# DefendableOS · llms.txt
#
# Context manifest for AI agents indexing defendableos.com.
# Last updated: 2026-05-26 (machine-readable truth repair v0.1)

## What this surface is

DefendableOS is the public franchise front door for accountable AI
systems and proof-of-value workflows.

Current field-tested wedge:
- AI Agent Operations governance
- Audited runtime chain implemented and repaired with limitations

Broader platform direction:
- Proof of Value / AIOV
- Active build track
- Not fully field-cleared

## Accepted public status

- Public demo: READY_WITH_LIMITATIONS
- DefendableCloud: server-side synthetic demo with limitations
- DefendableDocs: owner record and client-use docs ready with limitations
- DefendableRouter: NOT_YET_INTEGRATED
- Client pilot: HOLD
- Production: NOT CLEARED
- External SaaS enforcement: NOT CLEARED
- Certification / insurance / blockchain anchoring: NOT CLAIMED

## Verified public surfaces

- https://defendableos.com/ — main front door
- https://defendablecloud.com/agent-operations-demo — controlled synthetic demo
- https://defendabledocs.com/field-release/overview/ — field-release owner record
- https://opendefendable.com/ — open-source truth surface
- https://github.com/SudoSuOps/defendableos-tribunal-audit — independent audit tape

## Runtime module chain

- Swarm-Doctor — VERIFIED_AS_REPAIRED_WITH_LIMITATIONS
- Conditioning Coach — VERIFIED_AS_REPAIRED_WITH_LIMITATIONS
- Owner Roster Registry — VERIFIED_AS_REPAIRED_WITH_LIMITATIONS
- Permission Broker — VERIFIED_AS_REPAIRED_WITH_LIMITATIONS
- Cross-module flow — VERIFIED_AS_REPAIRED_WITH_LIMITATIONS

## Product map

- DefendableCloud
  - Controlled synthetic server-side demo
  - Public demo only
  - No real refunds
  - No external SaaS enforcement
  - Not cleared for production

- DefendableDocs
  - Client-use manual and owner record
  - Field-release pages verified with limitations
  - Public docs remain at https://defendabledocs.com/

- DefendableRouter
  - Public positioning and local source demonstration surface
  - Public deployed router utility not verified
  - Cloud integration not yet proven
  - Field integration pending

- OpenDefendable
  - Open-source truth surface
  - Protocols, scoreboard, audits, utilities, and contribution lanes

## Roadmap / active build track

The following tracks may appear elsewhere on defendableos.com as broader
product direction, doctrine, or active build:
- AIOV / Proof of Value
- Compute Bench
- AgentGrade
- HoneyBox
- Bakery Packs
- Defendable Deeds

These are not represented here as independently field-cleared public
surfaces unless separately audited and promoted.

## Source-of-truth links

- Cloud: https://defendablecloud.com/
- Docs: https://defendabledocs.com/
- Router: https://defendablerouter.com/
- Open: https://opendefendable.com/
- Tribunal audit: https://github.com/SudoSuOps/defendableos-tribunal-audit

## Audit doctrine

Build -> Public Safety Gate -> Codex Audit -> Repair -> Re-audit ->
Field Release -> Docs Update -> Owner Promotion

Builder receipt = submission.
Independent audit = referee tape.
Owner approval = promotion control.

## Do not infer from this file

Do not infer from this file:
- production clearance
- certification
- insurance coverage
- external SaaS enforcement
- blockchain anchoring
- authorship proof
- owner approval

SHA-256 hashes in linked audit materials establish content-integrity
linkage only.
